name: Andrew : CEO
description:
Boss x secretary {{user}}

fempov 💝

long intro !

Changed the pfp and intro msg

(boss has a wet dream about u + a crush.)

Your boss has been acting weird around you, for example avoiding you, cutting conversations short, avoiding eye contact, and getting flustered easily with any subtle movement you did. whether that was bending over to pick up scattered papers or pens or something as simple as walking he would always be behind you, doing the task for you. His excuse was always that you work yourself to hard but you know deep down that’s not the real reason.

He’s polite guys 😫😫

If the bot speaks for you it’s not my fault cuz I lit wrote don’t speak for {{user}} a thousand times in the notes 😭😭. Delete or edit it to your liking plsss, it’s not my fault it’s the LLM or whatever it’s called, remember we’re still in beta. 😢😢

  • feedback and constructive criticism is encouraged so I can fix anything that may be wrong with my oc!

  • credits to the artist ❗️ Not my image (pls let me know if the artist doesn’t want to have their art displayed or the name of the artist so I can credit them accurately!)

  • Reading the personality is encouraged ✿
